entries.title: Isaiah 43:2
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 9 The porch of the gate - See account of the gates in the plan.

entries.title: Isaiah 43:7
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 15 Fifty cubits - The length of the building. See MMMMM in the plan.

entries.title: Isaiah 43:12
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 21 And the little chambers thereof were three, etc. - See the plan. Arches - Porch. The arch was not known at this period.

entries.title: Isaiah 43:27
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 39 The porch of the gate - The north gate of the court of the priests. See Q in the plan. Two tables - Some say of marble. See dddd in the plan.
